name: Clone Repo Form
summary: Frontend modal form for entering repository URL and target project name for cloning
goals: Collect repository clone parameters with URL validation
Show clone progress feedback to the user

specDetail.description: A modal form that accepts a Git repository URL, optional target name, and branch. Validates the URL format and initiates the clone operation through the backend API.

parameters.name: repoUrl
parameters.description: Git repository URL (required, must be valid URL format)

parameters.name: projectName
parameters.description: Target project name (optional, defaults to repo name)

parameters.name: branch
parameters.description: Branch to clone (optional, defaults to default branch)

constraints: Must validate URL format before enabling submit
Must show progress indicator during clone operation
Must handle and display clone errors (auth failure, repo not found, network error)

acceptanceCriteria.given: the clone repo modal is open
acceptanceCriteria.when: the user enters a valid Git URL and submits
acceptanceCriteria.then: the clone operation starts with a progress indicator and completes with a success notification

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
